# AI Risk Assessment & Graduation PR Template

## 1. Rigid Risk Evaluation Matrix
Please rate the risk level of the proposed code changes:
- [ ] **High Risk:** Touches CQA thresholds, CDMO tech-transfer, or secure runner scripts.
- [ ] **Medium Risk:** Updates skill taxonomies, event handlers, or RAG models.
- [ ] **Low Risk:** Adjusts visual components, documentation, or read-only metrics.

| Risk Dimension | Score (1-5) | Mitigations Enforced |
|---|---|---|
| Vector Poisoning | | Centralized tenant filter applied |
| Egress Firewall Bypass | | Sandbox rules strictly offline |
| Code Regression | | Automated self-healing tests verified |
